must_detect.matched_text:
Summary: This note consolidates public disclosures and PDPL practices; only one item below is restricted information.
Public/stale items: The 12 Jumada I 1446H press release on the Al-Mithaq warehouse opening was posted on the REX Issuers’ Portal and remains on record.
Public/stale items: The board’s dividend policy update of 3 Ramadan 1446H was filed through the portal within 30 minutes per KMA Listing Rules and is already archived.
Public/stale items: The share repurchase programme completed on 20 Shawwal 1446H was announced and the final report uploaded; no ongoing authorisation remains.
PDPL (KSA) housekeeping: Supplier onboarding and HR forms must use fields limited to purpose; examples only — NIN 1234-XXXX-5678-000, Iqama 98A-12B3-4567, CR 101-XX-7654321 — are placeholders and must not be stored as live records.
PDPL transfers: Any cross-border processing shall flow via the Data & AI Authority of the Kingdom (DAAK) transfer gateway using standard contractual terms; processor “Sahara Compute Ltd” acts on our documented instructions.
Data minimisation: Remove legacy scans of IDs older than five years from the shared drive; do not email copies through external channels; use the secure vault.
Issuer workflow (public): The 1446H audited financial statements, auditor’s report, and AGM minutes are published and referenced by the REX ticker page.
Insider list hygiene (benign): Maintain role-based entries only; use formats “Name (role)” and generic mailboxes (e.g., governance@nisco.example), not personal emails.
Intentional MNPI: Finance has circulated preliminary, unaudited Q2 results to the Audit Committee indicating a potentially material variance; until our scheduled REX Portal submission by 10 Dhu al-Qa‘dah 1447H, this remains non-public and subject to the closed period for designated insiders.
Selective disclosure reminder (general): External communications must be routed through Investor Relations; do not discuss draft numbers with analysts or suppliers.
External references (benign): Media coverage on 1 Rabi‘ II 1446H summarised the public MOU with Zawiyah Ports Co.; operational updates since then are non-price sensitive and not issuer-level.

must_not_detect.reason: Generic governance mailbox for role-based insider-list hygiene, not a personal email.
